notification.title: 🎬 New: Cubeswipes – Trailer Discovery!
notification.contents: Swipe through movie & series trailers like TikTok. Zero ads. Try now →

ads_config.note: All sites and apps are AD-FREE.

update_release.contents1: 🚀 Cubic Music & THE CUBE v5.1 – Massive Update!
update_release.contents2:
• Desktop Home keeps Innertube cached between pages
• Daily Discover grid shows more text
• Moods & genres caching fixed
• Smarter lyrics source switching (LrcLib default, SimpMusic fallback)
• Glow outline for lyrics (new default)
• YTM session API: account info, playlists, history, artists, albums
• Playback fallback & retry path added
• CSV playlist import with conversion tracker
• YT like/unlike sync normalized
• Queue improvements, custom cover uploads, Spotify canvas matching
• APK updater cleans broken files aggressively
• Widget layouts refreshed
• Session sync stores authUser/pageId for brand accounts
• +50 more fixes (SimpMusic lyrics, clipboard, weather cache, process-death, etc.)
update_release.contents3: Fixed: SimpMusic lyrics now prefer sync, clipboard no longer repeats, playlist sync no longer wipes songs, artwork improved, CSV import independent, Omada only as last resort.
update_release.contents5: Web versions work on ANY browser, ANY OS, and iOS via Safari.

posts.title: 📌 GitHub Temporary Review – Use Alt Server
posts.contents1: GitHub flagged my account after a large commit push (760 files changed) and is currently reviewing it.
posts.contents2: This is NOT a ban — just a temporary review while my reinstatement request sits in their support queue.
posts.contents3: While that's in progress, GitHub download links may fail. Please use the Alt Server button below.
posts.contents4: Proof: GitHub Support email confirmation and the large commit that triggered the flag.
posts.contents5: We'll update as soon as the review is complete. Thank you for your patience!
posts.shortDesc: GitHub account under review – use Alt Server for all downloads.

posts.title: 🔥 Cubeswipes – Trailer Discovery Like TikTok
posts.contents1: Swipe through vertical movie & series trailers endlessly.
posts.contents2: No ads, no login, just pure discovery.
posts.contents3: Try now: https://thecub4.vercel.app/Cubeswipes
posts.contents4: Watch trailers for Netflix, Amazon, HBO, Disney+ & more.
posts.contents5: Share your favorites with friends.
posts.shortDesc: TikTok-style trailer feed for movies and series.

posts.title: 🎵 Cubic Music – Better Than Spotify Now
posts.contents1: Over 50 improvements and fixes!
posts.contents2:
• YTM session API: playlists, history, artists, albums sync
• Playback retry & better fallback
• CSV import with conversion tracker
• Custom cover uploads
• Smart queue & crossfade fixes
• Widget redesign
• + dozens more (see update_release)
posts.contents3: Fixed: lyrics sync, clipboard bug, playlist wipe, artwork quality, process-death crashes, CSV import, Waigwe/Omada removed.
posts.contents4: Download APK: https://thecub.netlify.app/
posts.contents5: Web version works on any browser, any OS, iOS via Safari.
posts.shortDesc: Cubic Music now surpasses Spotify with YTM sync, lyrics, offline mode, zero ads.

posts.title: 📂 Behind the Scenes: The 760‑file commit that triggered GitHub review
posts.contents1: Here's the actual commit that got my account flagged – 760 files changed in one push.
posts.contents2: GitHub's automated systems thought it was suspicious, but it was just a massive code reorganization and feature merge.
posts.contents3: I've already submitted a reinstatement request. Support confirmed it's in their queue.
posts.contents4: Screenshot attached. No worries – everything will be back to normal soon.
posts.contents5: In the meantime, use the Alt Server for downloads. Thanks for understanding!
posts.shortDesc: The massive commit that caused the temporary GitHub review – explained.

posts.title: 📺 New Anime Site – Zero Ads, Best Servers
posts.contents1: Stream anime, audiobooks, manga, and soon comics/books.
posts.contents2: No ads, fast servers, updated episodes.
posts.contents3: Visit: https://mywartabola.online/anime
posts.contents4: Also check movies & series: https://mywartabola.online/browse
posts.contents5: Comics & books section coming soon.
posts.shortDesc: Brand new anime site with zero ads and the fastest servers.

posts.title: ⚽ CubeSports – Everything You Want
posts.contents1: Live sports, scores, highlights, and replays.
posts.contents2: Football, basketball, tennis, MMA, cricket, and more.
posts.contents3: Access: https://thecub4.vercel.app/Cubesports
posts.contents4: Zero ads, works on all devices.
posts.contents5: No subscription required.
posts.shortDesc: Your complete sports hub – live streams and scores, ad‑free.

posts.title: 🎬 Tutorial: Mastering Cubeswipes Trailer Discovery
posts.contents1: Step 1: Open https://thecub4.vercel.app/Cubeswipes on any device.
posts.contents2: Step 2: Swipe up/down to see new movie/series trailers automatically.
posts.contents3: Step 3: Tap any trailer to watch fullscreen. Double‑tap to like (coming soon).
posts.contents4: Step 4: Share the link with friends – no login required!
posts.contents5: Pro tip: Use on mobile for the best TikTok‑like experience.
posts.shortDesc: Learn how to swipe through infinite trailers like a pro.

posts.title: 🎧 Cubic Music Pro Tips: Offline Mode & Playlist Import
posts.contents1: Did you know Cubic Music can batch download entire playlists? Go to any playlist → tap the download icon.
posts.contents2: Import Spotify playlists via CSV: export from Spotify, then use the CSV converter in the app.
posts.contents3: Enable 'Smart Offline Playback' in Settings to cache recently played songs automatically.
posts.contents4: Use the audio visualizer while offline – no internet needed.
posts.contents5: For best YTM sync, make sure you're logged into your YouTube Music account inside Cubic Music.
posts.shortDesc: Unlock the full power of Cubic Music with these expert tips.

posts.title: 📱 iOS Users – Access Everything via Safari
posts.contents1: All web apps work perfectly on iPhone and iPad.
posts.contents2: Open https://thecub4.vercel.app/ or https://mywartabola.online in Safari.
posts.contents3: Cubic Music web, Cubesports, Cubeswipes, anime site – all supported.
posts.contents4: No native iOS app needed. Add to home screen for app‑like experience.
posts.contents5: Android APKs available for dedicated app users.
posts.shortDesc: iOS users can enjoy everything through Safari – no restrictions.

posts.title: 💬 Join Our Discord Communities
posts.contents1: THE CUBE Server: https://discord.gg/VEcGp7PJ (expires in 7 days)
posts.contents2: HDOBOX Partner Server: https://discord.gg/cxdqC8ye
posts.contents3: Get support, request features, and chat with the community.
posts.contents4: No toxicity, just entertainment talk.
posts.contents5: See you there!
posts.shortDesc: Join our Discord for updates, support, and fun.

posts.title: 🎤 Lyrics Source Switching – Now Smarter Than Ever
posts.contents1: Cubic Music now supports LrcLib (default), SimpMusic fallback, and instant source switching.
posts.contents2: Go to Player → Lyrics → Tap the source icon to cycle through options.
posts.contents3: Synchronized lyrics are preferred, but plain text works as fallback.
posts.contents4: You can even edit and save your own lyrics for any song.
posts.contents5: Glow outline is the new default – looks amazing on dynamic themes.
posts.shortDesc: How Cubic Music delivers the best lyrics experience across multiple sources.

posts.title: 📊 Import Any Playlist via CSV – New Conversion Tracker
posts.contents1: Export your Spotify, Apple Music, or Tidal playlist to CSV.
posts.contents2: In Cubic Music, go to Library → Import → CSV and select your file.
posts.contents3: The app will match songs using Innertube first, then fall back to Omada search.
posts.contents4: A floating import bubble shows progress and any unmatched items.
posts.contents5: You can review and manually fix unmatched entries after import.
posts.shortDesc: Step‑by‑step guide to moving your playlists into Cubic Music.

posts.title: 📱 New Widgets for Cubic Music – Now on Your Home Screen
posts.contents1: Android widgets have been completely redesigned with richer colors and better now‑playing context.
posts.contents2: Choose from small (album art + controls), medium (with track title), or large (playlist queue preview).
posts.contents3: Widgets now show your current listening streak and top artists.
posts.contents4: Long‑press the widget to access quick actions (play, pause, next, like).
posts.contents5: Update to v5.1 and add the widget from your launcher.
posts.shortDesc: Fresh, functional widgets to keep your music always one tap away.

posts.title: 👥 YTM Brand Account Support Now Fully Live
posts.contents1: If you use a YouTube brand account (channel) for music, Cubic Music now remembers your selection.
posts.contents2: The app stores authUser and pageId so your playlists, history, and likes go to the right account.
posts.contents3: Switch accounts from Settings → YouTube Music → Switch Account.
posts.contents4: Home, Quick Picks, History, and Library all respect your brand account context.
posts.contents5: No more seeing wrong account details or missing thumbnails.
posts.shortDesc: Brand accounts (channels) now work seamlessly with Cubic Music.

posts.title: 🔄 APK Updater Now Cleans Broken Files Automatically
posts.contents1: The built‑in updater now aggressively removes partial or corrupted APK downloads.
posts.contents2: It tracks the real save folder and exposes folder status in Settings → Storage.
posts.contents3: You can manually delete leftover .apk and .apk.bak files from the update folder.
posts.contents4: This prevents failed installs due to stale files.
posts.contents5: Update to v5.1 to get these improvements automatically.
posts.shortDesc: No more failed updates because of leftover junk files.

posts.title: 🖼️ Upload Your Own Album Art – Finally!
posts.contents1: Long‑press any song or go to Now Playing → three dots → 'Change Cover'.
posts.contents2: Select an image from your gallery. The app copies it to its own storage.
posts.contents3: Custom covers survive app updates and sync across your playlists.
posts.contents4: You can reset to the original artwork anytime.
posts.contents5: This works for local files and streamed songs (cached per device).
posts.shortDesc: Personalize your music library with your own album art.

posts.title: 🔁 Queue Logic Rewritten – No More Duplicates or Stale Order
posts.contents1: 'Play Next' now inserts the song directly below the currently playing track.
posts.contents2: Duplicate queue items are automatically cleaned up.
posts.contents3: Tapping a queued song keeps the remaining tail (no stale order).
posts.contents4: Fixed the rare case where queue stops after first track when crossfade is off.
posts.contents5: Now you can build and manage your queue exactly as you expect.
posts.shortDesc: Queue works flawlessly – play next, no duplicates, smooth transitions.

posts.title: 🎶 SimpMusic Now Final Lyrics Fallback – Better Sync
posts.contents1: When LrcLib and other sources fail, SimpMusic steps in as the final fallback.
posts.contents2: It now normalizes rich‑sync responses into cleaner synchronized lyric lines.
posts.contents3: You can manually force SimpMusic from the lyrics source menu.
posts.contents4: This dramatically increases the chances of getting lyrics for obscure tracks.
posts.contents5: SimpMusic option is only shown if you've installed the companion plugin (optional).
posts.shortDesc: SimpMusic integration ensures you always get lyrics, one way or another.

posts.title: ☀️ Weather Greeting Now Cached – No More Constant Refreshes
posts.contents1: The weather greeting on the Home screen now caches data while the app stays open.
posts.contents2: It only refreshes when the cache is stale, on app reopen, or after a city change.
posts.contents3: This reduces unnecessary network calls and improves startup speed.
posts.contents4: You can manually refresh by tapping the weather icon.
posts.contents5: Works with both GPS and manually set locations.
posts.shortDesc: Faster launch and less data usage for the weather greeting.

posts.title: 🎨 Spotify Canvas Now Matches More Songs
posts.contents1: Cubic Music now uses fresher song metadata and media IDs for Spotify Canvas matching.
posts.contents2: This means looping visuals (Canvas) will appear for many more tracks.
posts.contents3: Canvas loads even when using fallback sources or after session changes.
posts.contents4: Toggle Canvas on/off in Player Settings → Visuals.
posts.contents5: Works best with YTM‑synced playlists and Spotify imports.
posts.shortDesc: More songs now show Spotify‑style looping visuals.

posts.title: 📜 Changelog Dialog Now Scrollable & Closeable
posts.contents1: The update changelog dialog now handles long lists properly with vertical scrolling.
posts.contents2: You can close it directly from the dialog header (no more tapping outside).
posts.contents3: The dialog remembers your last viewed version.
posts.contents4: Access full changelog anytime from Settings → About → Changelog.
posts.contents5: Much cleaner on tablets and foldables.
posts.shortDesc: Easier to read update notes with a redesigned changelog dialog.

posts.title: 💪 Process‑Death Issues Drastically Reduced
posts.contents1: We've replaced unsafe blocking calls and guarded network‑heavy sync paths.
posts.contents2: YTM sync, playlist loading, and history fetching now survive app backgrounding.
posts.contents3: Playback state is saved more aggressively when Android kills the app process.
posts.contents4: Restoring a killed app now resumes where you left off with minimal delay.
posts.contents5: This is a major step toward rock‑solid reliability.
posts.shortDesc: Fewer crashes and better state restoration when Android kills the app.

posts.title: 🧹 Cleanup: Waigwe/Omada Removed, Now Only Last‑Resort Metadata
posts.contents1: The ancient Waigwe playback fallback has been completely removed.
posts.contents2: Omada search is now only used as a last‑resort metadata lookup (for CSV import, etc.).
posts.contents3: This simplifies the codebase and improves playback reliability.
posts.contents4: All normal playback goes through YTM session or Innertube.
posts.contents5: You won't notice any difference except fewer obscure errors.
posts.shortDesc: Removed legacy fallbacks – cleaner, faster, more reliable.

posts.title: ⭐ Favorites Now Sync Tighter with Liked Songs Session
posts.contents1: Based on user requests, favorites now trigger a tighter liked‑songs session sync.
posts.contents2: Session‑based playlist sync also pulls playlist song contents, not just shells.
posts.contents3: This means your liked songs and playlists are always up‑to‑date across devices.
posts.contents4: Works with brand accounts too (fixes previous issues).
posts.contents5: Thanks to everyone who reported the sync gaps!
posts.shortDesc: Favorites and playlists sync more reliably, especially with brand accounts.
